programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy continues to fight against Cracker, whose powers to manipulate his surroundings may prove more troublesome than he had thought! Meanwhile, Brook and Pedro infiltrate the Whole Cake Island - and must hatch a plan to avoid getting caught!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The wind starts to go out of Luffy's sails as he fights an endless army of Biscuit Warriors! Meanwhile, the oldest two Vinsmoke brothers come home from a war to see their long-missing young brother Sanji.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy starts to run out of steam as the Biscuit Warriors keep multiplying! If he can buy himself 10 minutes to recharge…

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy needs just 10 minutes to recharge! Nami comes to rescue with the help of the Homies! Meanwhile, Sanji learns the terrible truth of Germa's power - and his father's dark history!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami challenges Cracker on her own! During the all-out fight, she loses her advantage and is close to defeat. Can Luffy bounce back in time? Meanwhile, Sanji's tragic childhood is made clear.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The terrible history of Sanji's family continue to unfold. From a rare moment of compassion, he is able to escape, only to face his father's cruelty before setting out on his own.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy is in an all-out, all-you-can-eat battle! As Cracker's endless stream of Biscuit Warriors marches on, Luffy's endless appetite is put to the test. Meanwhile, Reiju helps Sanji to straighten himself out before he meets his fiancée.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy needs to think fast in order to turn the battle in his favor - filled with biscuits, he debuts a new Gear Four attack that has lasting repercussions! Meanwhile, Chopper and Carrot find Sanji's reflection, but can they get a message to him in time?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy finally catches up with Sanji! However, as a happy past plays before his eyes in which he, Sanji, and the crew deepened their bonds, a new page is turning in the history of the Straw Hats.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji's journey with the crew looks to be coming to an end!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy makes a solemn promise to not move from his spot until Sanji returns to him. But as Mama's army advances, that promise may prove a costly one. Meanwhile, Sanji and the Vinsmokes come face to face with Big Mom and his bride-to-be Pudding!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy stands his ground and waits for his friend to return! But the vengeful army washes over him - only a true friend can step in to turn the tide of battle! Meanwhile, Sanji and Pudding discuss their marriage - and come to a startling conclusion!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy puts his all into battling Big Mom's vengeful army, however, their skills combined prove too formidable. Meanwhile, Sanji goes to Big Mom herself to bargain for the Straw Hats lives - with shocking results!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Chopper and Carrot are captured by Brulee and strung up for dinner! But Chopper sees a chance to free himself! Meanwhile, Brook and Pedro launch a plan to reach the Ponegliffs - a daring game of chance!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Pekoms creates a diversion for Brook to set his plan into action. Meanwhile, Luffy continues to goad Big Mom into a fight, and Pudding begins to have stirrings of rebellion herself!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Just when Luffy and Nami are in Big Mom's grasp, Pudding arrives, but with news that they aren't expecting - meanwhile Brook and Chopper both make headway getting out of their own jams!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji hopes his wedding with Pudding will solve the Straw Hat's predicament - but Pudding secretly plans to to avoid the marriage, sharing a secret with Luffy. Meanwhile, Brook comes face to face with Big Mom herself!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy tries desperately to free himself as the risk of his own well-being! Meanwhile, Chopper and Carrot continue to search the mirror universe, Brook squares off against Big Mom, and Pedro's past is revealed!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy struggles to break himself free as Sanji falls deeper in love with the idea of marrying Pudding... But the mask falls off and the deadly charade of Big Mom is revealed as the depths of her treachery come to light!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Brook continues his all-out struggle against Big Mom, but his secret weapon might not be enough to save him! Meanwhile, an unexpected ally from the past comes to the rescue!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Jimbei arrives on the scene and works to free Luffy and Nami! Meanwhile Sanji confronts his sister with the awful truth of Pudding, and she confides in him the powerful secret of their mother's undying love!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Brook finds himself totally at the whim of Big Mom, and comes face to face with her brutal love! Meanwhile, Pedro reveals his explosive plan to create a distraction!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Chopper and Carrot use the mirror dimension to get in touch with Nami and Jimbei! Luffy makes it through more obstacles to learn that he just missed Sanji! Meanwhile, Sanji wonders alone about the best course of action.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Brook hears Big Mom's plan firsthand as she shares her intentions with Pudding in front of him! Meanwhile, Big Mom's agents believe most of the Straw Hats to be under control, but doubt besets Montd'Or.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami and the others finally find Brook in the mirror dimension - but he's in the most inopportune of places! Can they challenge the sleeping Mama and rescue their friend? Meanwhile, Luffy is waylaid on his way back to the rendezvous!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy puts up a valiant fight in order to keep his word to Sanji! But will he be able to last until Sanji arrives at the rendezvous? Meanwhile, Jimbei shares the awful truth about the wedding with the other Straw Hats.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Hol Horse and Mondatta, Part 2

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Guardian of Hell, Pet Shop, Part 1
programme.desc: Jotaro and his friends continue to search for DIO's mansion in Cairo. Following Avdol's advice, they have a beggar look for the mansion and wait. Meanwhile, Iggy, wandering the city alone, is confronted by two large dogs.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Guardian of Hell, Pet Shop, Part 2

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: D'Arby the Player, Part 1

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: D'Arby the Player, Part 2

programme.desc: The baseball game with D'Arby continues within DIO's mansion. For some reason, Jotaro starts telling D'Arby what pitches he'll be throwing. D'Arby finds Jotaro's actions strange, but still believes he has the upper hand because of his Stand's abilities.

programme.title: Naked Science

programme.title: Naked Science
programme.desc: There is a theory that scientists once dismissed as absurd - that long ago the Earth became so cold every inch of it was entombed in ice.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Flight Status
programme.desc: The next 12 months will see an intense rise in flight tests, demonstration launches and high priority flights. Some are on time others are not. We check the flight status of some of this new hardware and these new capabilities.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Invasion Mars
programme.desc: For over 50 years we have bombarded Mars with our probes and landers. Spying from orbit to map terrain, finding her strengths and weaknesses. The time nearing for the full scale invasion of the planet- when humans walk on Mars and claim it for their own.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Juno, Cassini and Beyond
programme.desc: The Amazing Cassini spacecraft and its sibling lander, Huygens, have now concluded their scientific studies, bringing back years of data. Now, Juno piercing the cloak of Jupiter and her distant relative New Horizons at the edge of the solar system.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Invasion Mars
programme.desc: For over 50 years we have bombarded Mars with our probes and landers. Spying from orbit to map terrain, finding her strengths and weaknesses. The time nearing for the full scale invasion of the planet- when humans walk on Mars and claim it for their own.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Juno, Cassini and Beyond
programme.desc: The Amazing Cassini spacecraft and its sibling lander, Huygens, have now concluded their scientific studies, bringing back years of data. Now, Juno piercing the cloak of Jupiter and her distant relative New Horizons at the edge of the solar system.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Sling Shot
programme.desc: Soviet Luna 3 was the first to use gravity to change course to photograph the dark side of the Moon. NASA Mariner 10 used the technique to swing by Venus to target Mercury. The gravity sling shot maneuver has become a standard for space navigation.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Living Planet
programme.desc: We have been observing Earth for 40 years now, in the last 20 we have focus with intensity on the planet with new technologies and capabilities, we have accumulated a mass of data that is now revealing a complex and ever changing living planet.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Cosmic Collisions
programme.desc: Space is vast, yet it is full of collisions. Gas and dust electrostatically flock together, and gravity takes over coalescing grains into rocks. Those rocks become boulders, then asteroids colliding again and again, striking planets and each other.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Gravity
programme.desc: Gravity keeps us on the ground and the planets in their orbits, yet we only notice it when it's not there. In space we cheat gravity; falling just as fast but missing the ground. Now this fundamental universal force is slowly giving up its secrets.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Night Fire
programme.desc: The Northern Lights are more than just beautiful; they tell us about the make up of our planet, our sun, and may even be a signpost for the possibility of life on other planets.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Virtual Universe
programme.desc: Our understanding of the cosmos is limited by the amount of time we have to see it. Fortunately, computer simulations can help us see how galaxies interact over millions of years, and even how dark matter structures the universe.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Stargazer's Paradise
programme.desc: The Atacama desert is a perfect place for watching the night sky. With still winds and only a handful of cloudy nights each year, it allows scientists to get the absolute most out of their tools.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Hubble's Renaissance
programme.desc: Before we can reach space, we must first be able to see it. Hundreds of years ago, the simple telescope was used to give us a seemingly closer vantage. Today, we use the awe-inspiring, and super powerful, Hubble Space Telescope.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Superscopes
programme.desc: Discover the most powerful telescopes on the planet as they search for the mysteries of the universe.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rainbow
programme.desc: The human eye can only see visible light, a small spectrum of electromagnetic waves. Today, we have instruments that let us perceive all wavelengths.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Seasons of Saturn
programme.desc: Saturn is the second largest planet and has an astonishing 60 moons in its orbit. Thanks to the Cassini mission, it’s also one of the most studied and most photographed planets in our neighborhood.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Vesta Unveiled
programme.desc: With the Dawn missions exploration of the asteroid Vesta and the dwarf planet Ceres, asteroids are a hot topic. See what these incredible missions have uncovered.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Water Worlds
programme.desc: They key ingredient to life in the universe is water. Until recently we thought Earth was the only place in the solar system to have any water at all. Now that probes are peering around nearby worlds we are finding that is just not the case.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Gravity
programme.desc: Gravity has long been a force that has intrigued scientists. Now, for the first time scientists are probing to detect gravity waves in space as well as mapping the gravity patterns of the moon.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Science and the Shuttle
programme.desc: For more than 25 years the shuttle was our ticket to space, and our laboratory in orbit. Uncover the legacy of this amazing machine, and see what lies ahead.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Landing on Mars
programme.desc: Mars sparks our curiosity like no other planet because it is so reachable. Despite having landed there, most of the information we gather is still done by instruments in the planet's orbit.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Milky Way
programme.desc: This episode traces our view of the Milky Way, from the mythology of ancient skywatchers to the efforts of scientists to map it from the inside out.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Big Bang
programme.desc: When it comes to the birth of the universe, not even the most creative work of imagination can rival what science has revealed about the Big Bang.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.desc: Soon after Melinda's car is stolen by a troubled teenage boy, Kirk Jensen, Kirk's dead mother, Lacy, sends Melinda messages through Electronic Voice Phenomena (EVP) or "white noise" in her car radio and other electronics.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: When an up and coming boxing sensation is haunted by the ghost of his mother, whose death caused a rift between him and his father, Melinda must broker peace between them before the mother can crossover.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Martín está al borde de la muerte, sus nietas lloran junto a él, porque el médico dijo que no vale la pena llevarlo al hospital, Gabriela solloza afligida, en cambio, Fernando siente alivio.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Martín despierta furioso al darse cuenta de que le arruinaron su mejor fiesta, Norma le reclama a Gabriela su complicidad con Dínora y corre a buscar a Juan, su madre acepta que se casen.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan le encarga el vestido de novia de Norma a Leandro, quien se preocupa por su prima Ruth ante las injusticias de Raquel, mientras Óscar y Jimena negocian para salvar su matrimonio.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Fernando sigue a Sara y escondido, la ve con Franco, por lo que la insulta y le inventa mentiras, ella le da una bofetada y él busca a la aliada perfecta. Ruth defiende a los Reyes y a Leandro.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela interroga con insistencia a Fernando sobre el novio de Sara, Rosario le ruega a Franco que vuelva con ella, él le dice a quién ama; Armando da una orden, muy molesto con su esposa.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: En la hacienda Elizondo, Rosario le jura a Sara que luchará por Franco, Norma interroga a su hermana, quien delante de Jimena, dice que lo ama. Ruth escucha que es adoptada, Raquel le miente.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Sara se percata de los dos hombres que acechan a Franco y responde con rapidez, Ruth, sin saber a dónde ir, huye de casa de Raquel. Dínora busca a Gabriela con otro ardid contra Juan y Norma.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Ruth se desvela de la angustia y Eva la consuela, Hortencia se desmaya al ver al fantasma de Libia y pide perdón. Fernando desafía a Sara, al tiempo que Memo cumple la orden de su jefe Armando.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Hortencia tiembla porque Libia regresó para vengarse, Manolo confiesa lo sucedido la noche en la que la joven se suicidó tras visitar a los Elizondo. Memo le dice a Armando que mató a Rosario.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan le cuenta a Norma por qué Ruth los buscó, Jimena está furiosa, piensa que a ella le gusta Óscar. Melisa visita a Raquel acompañada de sus hijos, a la vez que Gabriela aconseja a Fernando.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Memo le daña los frenos al carro de Armando para acabar con él, pero quien se accidenta es otro. A Gabriela le molestan las visitas de Dínora, pero al menos descubre dónde está Ruth.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Raquel habla con Ruth, le ruega que regrese a casa y ella se niega, Juan le pide que respete esa decisión. Memo planea otro accidente para matar a Armando, esta vez espera no fallar.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Los matones de Armando le cuentan al jefe que Rosario está viviendo con Memo, van a buscarla pero ella escapa. Jimena visita a Ruth, le brinda su apoyo incondicional en momentos tan difíciles.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Dínora está en la hacienda, sus matones secuestran a Juan. Gabriela reflexiona y ahora solo quiere la felicidad de Norma, mientras Sara le confiesa a su madre de quién está enamorada.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The ten remaining teams depart Palacio Baburizza in Valparaiso, Chile, taking a lengthy bus trip to Puerto Varas.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The nine remaining teams depart the Pit Stop at Gruta de la Virgen in Puerto Varas, Chile for Bariloche, Argentina.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The eight remaining teams depart the Pit Stop at Estancia Fortin Chacabuco in Bariloche, Argentina for Hamburg, Germany.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The eight remaining teams are transported from the Pit Stop at the Indra Club in Hamburg, Germany's red-light district to a mystery location in France.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The seven remaining teams drive from the Pit Stop at the Church of Massiges in Verdun, France to Reims.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The six remaining teams depart the Pit Stop in Champagne Ardenne, France and fly to the Seychelles.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The six remaining teams depart the Pit Stop on the Seychellian island of Praslin and fly to Penang, Malaysia, heading to the Snake Palace.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The five remaining teams depart the Pit Stop at the Pinang Peranakan Mansion in Penang, Malaysia and head to Singapore, where they learn that a U-Turn awaits.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The four remaining teams depart the Pit Stop at Marina Barrage in Singapore and fly to Shanghai, China.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The four remaining teams depart the Pit Stop at the Shanghai Science and Technology Museum, with Louie and Michael knowing a Speed Bump awaits them.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Brent and Caite, Jet and Cord, and Dan and Jordan leave Shanghai and head to San Francisco and the finish line.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: This season's racers are introduced and for the first time in the history of The Amazing Race, the team to finish in first place will be awarded a surprise, game-changing advantage.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: One team considers using their precious Express Pass after playful Ghanaian locals give some teams a headache while they struggle to complete the high-stakes roadblock.

programme.desc: Barney gives a parking ticket to the Governor's car, and refuses to tear it up.

programme.desc: Barney Fife is sure that a Main Street gun duel is in the offing when an ex-con comes to town.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Barney look forward to seeing their high school sweethearts when the Mayberry Class of '45 holds a reunion.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A poor farmer successfully auditions to sing at a concert. Barney and Andy take it upon themselves to spruce him up for the event.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie meets a spoiled youngster and decides his own allowance should be tripled.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy uses common sense and Barney uses modern criminal detection methods to solve several burglaries at a filling station.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: The sheriff's knowledge of American history is put to the test by Opie and an attractive new history teacher.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show

programme.desc: Deputy Barney Fife invests his life's savings in a used car that turns out to be a lemon.

programme.title: The Challenge

programme.title: The Challenge

programme.title: The Challenge

programme.title: The Challenge

programme.title: The Challenge

programme.title: The Challenge

programme.title: The Challenge

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Arson Investigation: Insurance torchings, mob burnouts and arson murders: these crimes are designed to take all clues with them. But a solid case can be built from a heap of ashes.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When there's a difficult case to crack – whether it involves drugs, arson, or weapons – the investigators and scientists of the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco and Firearms have the means to crack it.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Explosives Investigations: The crime lab is the place where science meets murder. In New York State, Eleanor Fowler opened a small package, which as mailed to her home. When she lifted the lid the box exploded killing her instantly.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A woman is found dead at the bottom of the basement stairs. As detectives look into the accident, they begin to question the sequence of events.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Anytime, anywhere, people disappear – kidnapped from their daily routines. Predators always leave clues behind, but chasing them takes time, hampering investigators' attempts to solve these fatal abductions.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Poison is an almost invisible form of death, and toxicologists must look for hidden clues in blood and tissue to bring these murders to light.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Stolen Youths
programme.desc: A young girl playing in her yard in Spokane, Washington suddenly vanishes. In St. Louis another girl leaves to visit a friend. She never arrives.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Weeks pass as forensic investigators search for even the smallest clues, only to find what they feared in their own backyard. In Canada, two people die suddenly of unknown causes, and their deaths may not be as coincidental as they first appear.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A New York homebuyer gets more than he bargained for when a house inspection turns up a mummified corpse. For decades, the crime had gone undiscovered. The victim unmissed, and the killer unpunished.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Solving crimes may begin with gut intuition, but advanced science provides investigators with irrefutable proof. When criminals go to great lengths to mask their crimes, Investigators must step up the challenge and remain forever …undaunted.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The tiniest residue left at the scene can become a mark of distinction in the most singular and intimate of ways.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When a victim is gunned down at point-blank range, police often assume that a friend or acquaintance is to blame.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Drowning deaths often look like accidents and water can destroy the scant clues the killer may have left behind. Investigators must turn to forensic science to solve cases where the victim is found dead in the water.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Time of death is an important consideration in a murder investigation, but when a killer freezes, burns, or grinds his victim, even the most skilled medical examiner would be at a loss about how to calculate it.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Nils Swenson takes the marshal's place for a few days while Micah is away. To maintain peace, Nils insists that anyone coming into town must turn in their weapons.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas's self-confidence begins to slip away when he misses an easy shot that could have cost Mark his life.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A murder occurs at a railroad camp and a young Indian friend of Lucas is accused of the killing. When Lucas tries to help the boy, he finds himself on trial.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark come upon Winslow Quince, a peddler whose wagon has broken down. They help him bring his wagon to North Fork for repair.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gridley Mau, the son of a man Lucas killed during an attempted robbery, comes to North Fork looking for revenge.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The first railroad train is coming to the new North Fork station. Onboard is a Japanese nobleman and his servant, visiting the West to learn about the United States.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: At Halloween, rustlers take advantage of the seasonal disguises to raid a cattle ranch. Lucas' faith in his son's honesty is shaken when he hears rumors of Mark being mixed up with the thieves.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and Lucas run into Micah on the trail and help when the prisoner he is transporting injures his arm. Lucas' life is endangered when a snake crawls into his bed.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While Mark goes hunting for Old Spike, Lucas goes hunting for his mortal enemy. Lucas is thrown into jail to stop him from murdering his former friend.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is baffled when the marshal of a neighboring town refuses to hold a gambler who just attempted murder.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark is injured in an accident, leaving his legs paralyzed. At the doctor's suggestion, Lucas and Mark set out on a trek to Mission Springs.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mario Arsatti claims to be an acquaintance of a good friend from Lucas' past. But it's pleasure before business. Mario has been hired to kill Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas, who blames his wife's death on his father-in-law, refuses to help the old man elude a gang of gunmen.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The lazy Jackman brother's mortgage has been foreclosed. Unfit for farming, they head to a nearby town. The family patriarch becomes marshal and deputizes his sons.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and his girlfriend discover that an old hermit is very lonely. Old Tony invites them to lunch and lets them look for arrowheads on a remote part of his land.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark decide to enter a local turkey shoot to raise money to buy a ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Cattle baron Oat Jackford orders his two cowboys to run Lucas McCain and his son off their ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark gets caught on a mountain ledge, a young outlaw risks his life to rescue him and breaks his leg doing so.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The notorious Shelton rides into the town of North Fork to take revenge on an elderly Marshal who is now crippled and working for Lucas McCain.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Johnny Gibbs, Lucas McCain's brother-in-law, visits the McCain ranch. Gibbs, a rodeo rider wanted by the law, begins stirring up trouble.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A vengeful judge who believes Lucas was responsible for his son's death, kidnaps Mark McCain to revenge himself on Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A handsome Italian count arrives in North Fork. The town bully ridicules his manner of speech and dress and provokes the Count to challenge him to a duel.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A new bank opens and Banker Hamilton hires a slow-witted gunman to guard the safe. When some of the gunman's old outlaw friends arrive in town they propose he join them in robbing the bank.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark tries to play Cupid between Lucas and a stranger who arrives in North Fork, the girl's older brothers accuse him of trifling with her affections and challenge him to fight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An arch-criminal has been run out of New Orleans and is passing through North Fork. Spotting the McCain ranch, he tells McCain he wants to buy it.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Dan Willard takes on Marshal Micah Torrence's job. With no experience, he takes a tough stand with a bunch of Texas cowhands whose high spirits are evident at the saloon.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark are returning from a big cattle sale when the stage is robbed by three outlaws. Lucas, desperate to recover the money that was stolen, is determined to pursue the outlaws.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Millicent Barnes sees her double at a bus terminal.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Paranoia strikes the residents of Maple Street when they believe human-looking aliens have invaded the neighborhood.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Businessman Arthur Curtis discovers that life as he knows it doesn't really exist.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Walter Jameson is an excellent history teacher who talks about the past as if he had lived it.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: When a space exploration crashes on Mars, the surviving passenger is surprised to find that Martians are human-looking, very friendly and apparently just like us...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Just before being hanged for shooting a man in the back, a man in 1880 is transported into the year 1959 by a professor who soon realizes that he has brought forward a savage killer.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An over-the-hill boxer gets a boost from one of his biggest fans - a little boy with an unwavering belief in magic.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: After being shot to death, Rocky Valentine encounters the amiable white-haired Mr. Pip, who gives Rocky everything he wishes for.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Schoolteacher Helen Foley finds a strange and very serious little girl on the stairs outside her apartment. The little girl seems to know her, and tries to jog her memory about a man she saw earlier that day. The man arrives at Helen's door…

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Riding home on the train one day, a man falls asleep and dreams it is 1880, and he is entering a small town called Willoughby.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man, desperate to win the affection of a beautiful woman, slips her a love potion. He is overjoyed that the potion works so well...at first.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A trumpet player who's convinced he'll never amount to anything attempts suicide and finds himself in a world where no one can hear or see him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An eccentric loser gets a new life from his guardian angel, but there is a price to keeping it.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A woman discovers that the floor of a department store, on which she bought a gold thimble, doesn't exist - and that her 'saleslady' is really a mannequin!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A scientist arranges to have his human-looking robot pitch for the struggling local baseball team.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A playwright makes characters come to life.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A pilot of a downed WW II bomber comes to in the African desert and desperately tries to find out what happened to the rest of his crew.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A luckless couple stumbles upon fortune when a genie materializes from a bottle in their antique shop. The genie grants them four wishes but warns them, prophetically, to be careful what you wish for.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Small time criminal Jackie Rhoades must face both his past and his conscience while waiting for his next assignment.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Bartlett Finchley's paranoia about the machines around proves true.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A pair of newlyweds stopping in a small town are trapped by their own superstition when playing a fortune-telling machine in a local diner.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The daughter of an inventor objects to their 'perfect' home where they are waited on by mechanical servants.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A nostalgic actor revisits his late wife and friends at their old haunt, only to find that he is now out of place there.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: When three dum-dum crooks get ahold of a camera that takes pictures of the future, they set out to make a quick fortune with their new toy.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: After a derelict Santa Claus is fired on Christmas Eve, he finds a mysterious bag that gives out presents. With this bag he sets out to fulfill his one wish - to see the less fortunate inherit the bounties of Christmas.

programme.desc: The group has a difficult time molding to a new lifestyle, forcing them to consider whether they can be the people they once were.

programme.desc: As Rick and the others continue to acclimate to their new surroundings, they consider a return to normalcy.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.desc: The group must contend with a new set of issues while out on a mission, and must push through to survive.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El vehículo se avería y el grupo continúa a pie hacia Washington D. C., pero les sorprende una tormenta y buscan cobijo en un granero, donde encuentran algo totalmente inesperado e inquietante.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Aaron invita al grupo a Alexandria, su comunidad, un lugar que, según él, es seguro y amigable. Rick, incapaz de olvidar Woodbury y Terminus, desconfía de Aaron, pero Michonne quiere darle una oportunidad.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los integrantes del grupo tienen entrevistas con Deanna, la jefa de Alexandria, y esperan en las casas que les asignan a saber si son aceptados o rechazados. Cuando conocen a los habitantes de la comunidad, perciben que no están bien entrenados.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick, Daryl y Carol se reúnen en secreto para planear cómo recuperar sus armas del arsenal de Alexandria, ya que temen que, si algo sale mal, van a necesitarlas.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Gareth y su grupo de caníbales atacan la iglesia mientras Rick y sus compañeros están en el bosque buscándolos para vengar a Bob. Además, el padre Gabriel confiesa el siniestro acto de su pasado que no deja descansar a su conciencia.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Beth se despierta en un hospital de Atlanta, pero pronto se da cuenta de que los mismos que la auxiliaron y sanaron no la dejarán marchar. No obstante, su nuevo amigo, Noah, y ella tratan de huir del recinto.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Mientras se dirigen hacia el norte, el grupo se ve obligado a detenerse porque una horda de zombis bloquea el camino. La tensión aumenta y la situación termina por estallar cuando Eugene confiesa un secreto que había ocultado a todos hasta ahora.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carol y Daryl persiguen a los captores de Beth por una Atlanta devastada, pero su auto se queda sin gasolina y deben pasar la noche en un refugio para mujeres.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl y Noah regresan a la iglesia para pedirles ayuda a sus compañeros. Rick y otros integrantes del grupo van a Atlanta con la intención de secuestrar a varios policías para intercambiarlos por Beth y Carol.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick busca una salida pacífica al conflicto, pero sus enemigos la rechazan y prefieren zanjar las cosas de forma violenta.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack's attempted romance with Felipe's beautiful cousin, Maria, is plagued by problems - Janet, Terri, Maria's inability to speak English, and Maria's fiancé.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Janet is happy that her old friend, Randy, is dating Jack - until she discovers that Randy is married.

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Furley discovers that the nice young man that Janet and Jack have fixed Terri up with is a convicted murderer.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Larry completely trusts Jack to show his teenage sister around town - until he discovers that they are still out at 2 a.m.

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: When the Bistro's building inspector demands a bribe from Jack, Janet suggests that they tape the next conversation for evidence. The recording the police hear, however, is of Furley telling Jack he has the pot (terrain) he wanted.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Terri is making plans for her wedding to a soap opera star - until Jack discovers that his sleazy reputation is well-earned.

programme.desc: Jack challenges a guy who has insulted Furley to a boxing match. His opponent, the girls learn, is a Golden Glove contender with 22 knockouts.

programme.desc: Furley helps Jack lose his "I can stay away for a week" bet with the girls.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and Terri believe that Janet is trying to seduce Furley's shy nephew.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Instead of catching sleep in the dingy apartment above his restaurant, Jack catches Mr. Angelino with a young woman.

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Cheryl asks Jack to father her child, but Jack refuses. Janet thinks Cheryl wants to marry Jack because she's going to have his baby, so she talks Jack into complying with Cheryl's wishes. Guest Star(s): Joanna Kerns

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Larry discovers an answered magazine quiz and he and Jack think one of the girls wants to have an affair with Jack. They take the girls on a weekend trip to find out who answered the quiz so Jack can talk her out of it.

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack writes a nasty letter to a famous food critic, thinking the critic is going to give his bistro a ruinous review. When the critic assures Jack the review will be favorable, Jack tries to retrieve the letter from the critic's desk.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack is dating a sex therapist who has asked him to keep her job a secret. Janet, concluding she is a prostitute, is nasty to her and no one can understand why - especially when Janet's own father has become so friendly with her.

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.title: Rob Brant vs Ryota Murata 1
programme.desc: On October 20th, 2018 Rob Brant faced Ryota Murata for a second time for the WBA World Middleweight title at the Park Theater in Las Vegas that ended in a unanimous decision victory for Brant.

programme.title: Robeisy Ramirez vs Abraham Nova
programme.desc: On June 18th, 2022, Robeisy Ramirez and Abraham Nova fought for the IBF USBA & WBO Global Featherweight titles at Madison Square Garden resulting in a knockout victory for Robeisy Ramirez.

programme.title: Robeisy Ramirez vs Brandon Valdes
programme.desc: On December 12th, 2020, Robeisy Ramirez fought Brandon Valdes in a featherweight bout in The Bubble at MGM Grand in Las Vegas. Ramirez showed his impressive speed and natural power, stopping Valdes in the sixth round.

programme.title: Roberto Duran vs Davey Moore
programme.desc: On June 16th, 1983 Roberto Duran fought Davey Moore for the WBA World Super welterweight title at Madison Square Garden in New York Moore was knocked down in the 7th round giving the win to Duran.

programme.title: Roberto Duran vs Iran Barkley
programme.desc: On February 24th, 1989, Roberto Duran fought Iran Barkley for the WBC Middleweight Title in Atlantic City. Duran, known for his relentless aggression, defeated Barkley by a close split decision in what was named The Ring Fight of the Year for 1989.

programme.title: Roberto Duran vs Jimmy Batten
programme.desc: On November 12th, 1982 Roberto Duran faced Jimmy Batten at the Orange Bowl in Miami, Fl. It ended in an unanimous decision victory for Duran.

programme.title: Roberto Duran vs Sugar Ray Leonard 1
programme.desc: On December 7th, 1989 Roberto Duran and Sugar Ray Leonard fought for the first time for the WBC World Super Middleweight at the Mirage Hotel in Las Vegas resulting in a unanimous decision win for Leonard.

programme.title: Roman Gonzalez vs. Juan Francisco Estrada 1
programme.desc: On November 17th, 2012, Roman Gonzalez fought Juan Francisco Estrada for the WBA World Light Flyweight Title at the Sports Arena in Los Angeles. In a successful title defense fight, Gonzalez earned the unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Roy Jones Jr vs James Toney
programme.desc: On November 18th, 1994, Roy Jones Jr fought James Toney for the IBF Super Middleweight Title at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas. Jones displayed his exceptional athleticism and speed, outclassing Toney to win a unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Roy Jones Jr vs Julio Ceasar Gonzalez
programme.desc: On July 28th, 2001 Roy Jones Jr and Julio Ceasar Gonzalez battled for IBA, IBF, IBO, WBA and WBC World Light Heavyweight titles at the Staples Center in Los Angeles resulting in a win for Jones with a unanimous decsion.

programme.title: Roy Jones Jr vs Percy Harris
programme.desc: On December 5th, 1992 Roy Jones Jr. fought Percy Harris for the WBC Continental Americas Super Middleweight title at the Trump Taj Mahal in Atlantic city with Jones defeating Harris in the 4th round by technical knockout.

programme.title: Roy Jones Jr vs Thomas Tate
programme.desc: On May 27th, 1994 Roy Jones Jr. went up against Thomas Tate in a 12 round bout for the IBF World Middleweight title that ended in the second round by technical knockout giving Jones Jr. the win.

programme.title: Ryota Murata vs Rob Brant 2
programme.desc: On July 12th, 2019 Ryota Murata participated in a rematch with Rob Brant for the WBA World Middleweight title at the EDION Arena Osaka in Japan resulting in a second round knockout securing the win for Murata.

programme.title: Sean O'Grady vs Hilmer Kenty
programme.desc: On April 12th, 1981 Sean O'Grady battled Hilmer Kenty for the WBA World Lightweight title at Ballys Park Place Hotel Casino in Atlantic City the 15 round bout ended in a unannimous decision win for O'Grady.

programme.title: Sergio Martinez vs Julio Cesar Chavez Jr
programme.desc: On September 15th, 2012, Sergio Martinez fought Julio Cesar Chavez Jr for the WBC Middleweight Title at the Thomas & Mack Center in Las Vegas. Despite an incredible effort from Chavez Jr in the final round, Martinez survived and won by decision.

programme.title: Sergio Martinez vs Kelly Pavlik
programme.desc: On April 17th, 2010, Sergio Martinez fought Kelly Pavlik for the World Middleweight Championship at Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City. Showing his confidence, Martinez put on the pressure and found his range, earning an unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: When the city's hottest nightclub, "Dancitron" opens up, its patrons mysteriously start aiding the Decepticons. After his break-dancing crew gets run off by the club's security, Raoul gets some backup from his trusted Autobot friends.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: To aid in their latest scheme, The Decepticons kidnap a scientist. When Autobot Powerglide embarks on a high-altitude mission to save her, they form a bond that will keep his spirits flying high… even in the middle of a Decepticon fight.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: To aid in their latest scheme, The Decepticons kidnap a scientist. When Autobot Powerglide embarks on a high-altitude mission to save her, they form a bond that will keep his spirits flying high... even in the middle of a Decepticon fight.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: It's Decepticon versus Decepticon when triple changers Astrotrain and Blitzwing decide to seize power. Using a molecule-freezing device to take Megatron and Starscream out of the picture, the two are free to lead how they see fit.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: An S.O.S. seeking help from the Autobots arrives from the desperate people of the planet Traal, who have been forced into slave labor by Deceptitron. Seaspray arrives with the Autobots rescue team, and discovers much more than he was planning on.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 1 of 2. Megatron creates a powerful strike team, but his Stunticons lack sentience and independent thought. This leads the Decepticons deep into the heart of Cybertron to steal Vector Sigma, the computer that brought life to those on the planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 2 of 2. Attempting to even the odds against the Stunticons, the Autobots create the Aerialbots to join in the battle against Megatron, who plans to use Vector Sigma to turn the Earth into a metal planet like Cybertron!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Robots are truly in disguise when the Autobots pose as Stunticons to uncover Megatron's latest plan involving the thefts of some high-profile materials.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Autobots participate in a charity road race to watch over an experimental race car—a car made of a special type of material Megatron needs to complete his latest doomsday weapon, a weather-dominating device capable of mass destruction.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Autobots participate in a charity road race to watch over an experimental race car - a car made of a special type of material Megatron needs to complete his latest doomsday weapon, a weather-dominating device capable of mass destruction.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Aerialbots are thrown back in time to Cybertron's Golden Age. While there, they learn the truth of Megatron's early treachery as well as witness firsthand the creation of Cybertron's greatest hero, Optimus Prime!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Megatron becomes infected with cosmic rust, a metal-consuming plague. When Autobot scientist Perceptor is forced to find a cure for Megatron, the entire Autobot civilization is again put at risk of extinction. But an Autobot invention may save them...

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: After a failed attempt on Megatron's life, Starscream is banished to a deserted island. There he finds the remains of World War II battle vehicles and decides to use them as the basis for his own attack team, the Combaticons.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: United as “Bruticus,” the Combaticons are virtually unstoppable. They plan to pull the Earth into the Sun to eliminate all of their enemies at once. The only hope is for the Autobots and Decepticons to join forces to take Bruticus down!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Aerialbots Slingshot and Skydive disguise themselves as normal jet fighters to expose a ring of human thieves stealing aircraft. But when they learn that Megatron is behind the scheme, they must combine with the other Aerialbots to convert into Superion!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Three high school students create more trouble than they can handle when they use a Decepticon personality component in their science fair project. The Autobots come to rescue the students, but the science project may actually have to save the Autobots!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series

programme.title: Basketball Wives

programme.title: Basketball Wives

programme.desc: Evelyn and Chad meet to discuss social media accusations of infidelity, the ladies discover some shocking videos of Kenya online, and Royce is up for an off-Broadway show.

programme.desc: Tami sees red over Kesha talking behind her back. Also, the ladies are conspicuously absent from one of Jen's lip gloss launch events.

programme.title: Basketball Wives

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: With his life points on the line, Yusei must figure out a way to take down Ghost's Meklord Emperor Wisel before Wisel's special ability throws his game and his runner into a tailspin.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: When Vice Chancellor Rudolph Heitmann threatens to expel all the members of Leo and Luna's class from Duel Academy, Yusei attempts to teach the teacher a valuable lesson by challenging the Vice Chancellor to a duel to keep his friends in school.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: When Crow is asked to convince an old friend of Martha's to move into her retirement home, Crow decides to tackle the task by challenging the old man to a trash-talking junkyard duel. Can Crow convince the old man to relocate?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: When a loan shark starts sinking his teeth into New Domino City, Jack decides to reel in this money-grubbing menace for good by putting his most prized possessions on the line in a duel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: When Leo and Luna decide to go exploring a nearby forest rumored to be haunted by wicked spirits, they soon discover that the rumors are all too real when a mysterious boy traps Luna in his house and challenges Leo to a duel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: Yusei wakes up to find himself trapped in the back of a big rig with a bump on his head and no way out. After a mysterious tip leads Akiza to Yusei's location, the two friends soon find themselves Turbo Dueling an unfamiliar foe.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: As the battle between Yusei and Sherry races on, Sherry reveals some shocking secrets about the upcoming World Racing Grand Prix. Meanwhile, Akiza begins to gain a new understanding and appreciation for Turbo Dueling while riding shotgun to Yusei.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: Before heading out to the event of the year - The World Racing Grand Prix Gala - Yusei challenges Jack to a Turbo Duel in the hopes of finding a new dueling strategy that doesn't involve the use of Synchro Monsters.

programme.desc: A mysterious duelist named Vizor offers to show Yusei a new dueling strategy known as The Synchro Solution.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: After a string of Duel Runner thefts has New Domino City on high alert, Jack Atlas decides to take justice into his own hands and ventures out in search of those responsible.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: When a mysterious new student gives Luna a-one-of-a-kind Duel Board, Leo, trusting his instincts, steps up and tries to pull a 180 on their friendship.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: As the Duel Board battle between Leo, Luna and the mystery duelist continues, Leo soon realizes that their mysterious opponent is actually an all-too-familiar friend.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: Jack and Crow set out to find a restless Yusei - hoping to ease his mind and reinforce the friendship they share by Turbo Dueling down memory lane.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: Yusei and the gang trail Lazar to the local mall hoping to reacquire the engine design program that this window-shopping, noodle-eating crook stole from them.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: Yusei and Lazar are trapped in a warehouse where their only chance of escaping is if Yusei can outduel a Guard Bot whose CPU has been uploaded with all of Yusei's battle techniques.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: When Zora's stubborn son Leon suddenly returns home, Crow picks a duel with him to help him realize that the ongoing quarrel he has with his mother is much ado about nothing.

programme.desc: Cat is devastated when a cable network cancels a TV show about a family of cross-dressers.

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: Sam and Cat take care of a goat and try to win over their landlord's son, who wants them evicted. Dice starts managing Goomer, a dumb MMA fighter.

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: Sam and Cat babysit two polite British girls; Sam tries to fulfill a community service requirement at Elderly Acres.

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: When a babysitting client says, "You're my favorite babysitter ever", Sam and Cat debate which one of them he meant. They compete for their new clients' affection to see who really is the best babysitter.

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: When a babysitting client says, 'You're my favorite babysitter ever', Sam and Cat debate which one of them he meant. They compete for their new clients' affection to see who really is the best babysitter.

programme.title: Victorious: Stage Fighting
programme.desc: Tori has to defend herself after Jade claims Tori hurt her in a stage fighting exercise. Meanwhile, Trina has to fend off Robbie's advances when he thinks their stage kiss meant something.

programme.title: Victorious: Beck's Big Break
programme.desc: Tori accidentally gets Beck fired from a small role in a movie, then must figure out a way to get him his job back. Meanwhile, Robbie suffers frightening nightmares about his best friend Rex.

programme.title: Victorious: Tori the Zombie
programme.desc: Tori gets the lead in a high profile school musical, but freaks out when a stage makeup project goes awry, and she's left looking like a zombie on opening night.

programme.title: Victorious: Jade Dumps Beck
programme.desc: After a jealous Jade dumps Beck, she soon regrets it and recruits Tori to help get him back. Meanwhile, Trina puts on a one-woman show and tells Robbie he better give it a good review… or else!

programme.title: Victorious: The Birthweek Song
programme.desc: Tori struggles to find the perfect birthday gift for Trina, then decides to write her sister a song as a present. An ungrateful Trina turns the song into cash by selling it, enraging Tori.

programme.title: Victorious: Robarazzi
programme.desc: Tori suggests Robbie capture videos of students' everyday lives to increase his blog traffic, but when the camera is turned on Tori, she asks him to stop. Only Robbie doesn't and Tori realizes she's created a monster.

programme.title: Victorious: A Film by Dale Squires
programme.desc: When a hot young filmmaker comes to Hollywood Arts, the kids are excited to work on his project. But when the film is released, and they aren't given credit, the kids turn to revenge.

programme.title: Victorious: Rex Dies
programme.desc: As the kids prepare for a big play, Rex is accidentally sucked into a giant fan and Tori is responsible. Robbie is an emotional wreck, and it's up to Tori to save the day by saving Rex's life.

programme.title: Victorious: The Diddly-Bops
programme.desc: Sikowitz recruits the gang to form a children's band for a friend's party. When a leaked video of the group's performance becomes popular, Andre struggles to be taken seriously as a musician.

programme.title: Victorious: Cat's New Boyfriend
programme.desc: Cat begins dating Tori's ex-boyfriend, Danny (Matt Angel) and Tori becomes jealous. Meanwhile, Trina convinces Robbie, Andre, Jade and Beck to indulge their feet in callus-eating fish that she's been buying from some stranger.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly, Sam, and Freddie do iCarly from an apartment that is rumored to be haunted. When creepy things start happening, the friends worry that the ghost rumors just might be true.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Spencer saves the life of the lead singer of The Plain White T's and gets him to agree to go on iCarly. Strange things start going wrong in the middle of Carly, Sam, and Freddie's webcast

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Sam gets detention on the night of iCarly's 50th web show spectacular. Unable to do their normal webcast, Carly and Freddie do their best to get detention too so they can do the show from inside detention with Sam.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly, Sam, and Freddie are invited to Daka headquarters where they are offered a large sum of money to endorse Daka's new shoe, the Tech-Foot, on iCarly. But the shoes turn out to be terrible.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly gets a B on a History paper she should have gotten an A on. Sam, seeing an opportunity during her weekly meeting with Principal Franklin, changes Carly's grade in the computer and surprises her with the straight A's.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: A big time producer wants to make iCarly into a TV show. But Carly, Sam, and Freddie are soon upset to learn all of the big changes the producer wishes to make.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Sam gets a boyfriend, and the two are inseparable. But when the relationship starts affecting iCarly, Carly and Freddie know they have to do something.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: After watching a segment on iCarly that showed a man who sells illegal copies of movies, two detectives decide to use Carly and Spencer's loft for a stakeout.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly learns that because of her web show she's been given the opportunity for a full scholarship to the elite private school, Briarwood. Carly's not so sure about it, but Sam and Freddie know they have to change her mind.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Freddie's in need of some guy time, so he tags along with Spencer to go fencing. Freddie's a natural, but things get complicated when Spencer gets him involved in a match with the amazing Doug Toder.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When their friend Gibby is too shy to ask out the girl he likes, the gang decides to make him and his crush contestants in an 'iWin A Date' segment on the web show.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Mrs. Ackerman, the gang's teacher, goes through a rough breakup with her boyfriend, causing her to quarrel with her students. A visit from Spencer to sort out the dispute turns into a date.
